name: Moweaqua North Park
description: Moweaqua North Park is a place to play pickleball in Moweaqua, IL. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: The First Baptist Church - Moweaqua
description: Come play pickleball at The First Baptist Church - Moweaqua in Moweaqua, IL! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights. The courts are private.
